name: Aztec Couscous
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups black beans, rinsed and drained (or 1 can of black beans)
3 tablespoons to 4 tablespoons freshly squeezed lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place couscous, cumin, and salt in a large heatproof bowl or storage container.
2. Pour 1 cup boiling water on top of the ingredients.
3. Cover tightly and let sit until all the liquid is absorbed, about 10 minutes.
4. If the couscous is not quite tender, add an additional 1/4 cup of boiling water,
cover, and let sit for a few minutes longer.
5. Fluff up with a fork using a fork.
6. Toss in the beans, corn, onion, cilantro, and jalapeno.
7. Mix in the olive oil and enough lime juice to give the salad a puckery edge.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
